faqTitle: How does this posture corrector work?
faqDescription: A posture corrector provides gentle support to your shoulders, upper back, and spine, helping encourage proper alignment throughout the day. It serves as a reminder to maintain better posture while sitting, standing, or walking. For the best results, wear it for short periods initially and gradually increase usage over time.

faqTitle: Is it suitable for all ages and body types?
faqDescription: Yes, the posture corrector is designed with adjustable straps to comfortably fit most adults and teenagers. Its flexible design accommodates a wide range of body shapes and sizes. If you have a medical condition or recent injury, consult a healthcare professional before use.

faqTitle: Does it really help with back pain and posture improvement?
faqDescription: A posture corrector can help reduce discomfort caused by poor posture by encouraging proper spinal alignment. While it may provide relief from mild back, neck, and shoulder strain, lasting posture improvement is best achieved when combined with regular stretching, strengthening exercises, and good ergonomic habits.

faqTitle: Does it have smart features like vibration alerts?
faqDescription: No, this posture corrector is a non-electronic support device and does not include smart features such as vibration reminders, Bluetooth connectivity, or mobile app integration. Its effectiveness comes from providing consistent physical support and posture awareness.

faqTitle: How will I be notified when the product is back in stock?
faqDescription: If the product is currently unavailable, you can subscribe to back-in-stock notifications by entering your email address on the product page. We'll send you an email as soon as the item becomes available again.
